title: Realistic Sun & Moon
body:
Realistic Sun & Moon Resource Pack

For the best feeling use: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dramatic-skys and https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-hd-512x

Enhance your Minecraft skies with a more immersive and realistic sun and moon. This resource pack replaces the default textures with high-quality visuals that better reflect real-world lighting and detail.

The sun features a softer glow and more natural color gradients, while the moon includes improved shading and surface detail for a more authentic night sky. These subtle changes make both day and night feel more atmospheric without straying too far from Minecraft’s original style.

Features:

Realistic sun with smoother lighting and color transitions
Detailed moon texture with enhanced surface features
Lightweight and performance-friendly

Perfect for players who want a more immersive experience without heavily modifying the core look of Minecraft.
